principles.name: Think Before Coding
principles.notes: 3 review passes: type contracts, integration gaps, logical issues. Each pass verified against backend DTOs.

principles.name: Simplicity First
principles.notes: Minimal fixes — only touched files with verified issues. No speculative refactoring.

principles.name: Surgical Changes
principles.notes: Each fix targets exactly one issue. No drive-by cleanups.

principles.name: Goal-Driven Execution
principles.notes: Verified with tsc --noEmit, vite build, npm test after each fix round.

principles.name: Prefer shared utility packages over hand-rolled helpers
principles.notes: Reuses useAuthenticatedApi hook, ApiError, Select, DatePicker, Modal across all forms.

principles.name: Don't probe data YOLO-style
principles.notes: All API contracts verified against backend Java DTOs before wiring.

principles.name: Validate boundaries
principles.notes: Form validation via HTML5 required/min/maxLength. API errors surfaced via ApiError.

principles.name: Typed SDKs
principles.notes: TypeScript types match backend DTOs. CursorPage/Page generics for pagination.
